recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.overview: After tragedy strikes, an unlikely young hero takes her rightful place among the Power Rangers to face off against the team's oldest archnemesis.

recommendations.title: Balto: Wolf Quest
recommendations.overview: Balto and his daughter Aleu embark on a journey of adventure and self discovery.

recommendations.title: LEGO Batman: The Movie - DC Super Heroes Unite
recommendations.overview: Joker teams up with Lex Luthor to destroy the world one brick at a time. It's up to Batman, Superman and the rest of the Justice League to stop them.

recommendations.title: Emerald Green
recommendations.overview: Emerald Green is the stunning conclusion to Kerstin Gier's Ruby Red Trilogy, picking up where Sapphire Blue left off, reaching new heights of intrigue and romance as Gwen finally uncovers the secrets of the time-traveling society and learns her fate.

recommendations.title: Bionicle 2: Legends of Metru Nui
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: In the time before time, six unlikely Matoran find themselves transformed into mighty Toa. The new Toa Metru must prove themselves as true heroes, find the missing Toa Lhikan, and uncover a plot that threatens the heart of Metru Nui.
